			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT option_name, option_value FROM $table_name WHERE option_name LIKE %s AND option_value LIKE %s",

				'%fbtrace_id%'
			)

$wpdb->get_results(

				'_oembed_%',
				'{{unknown}}'
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare(
						"SELECT *
						FROM $feeds_table_name
						WHERE settings LIKE CONCAT('%', %s, '%') OR settings LIKE CONCAT('%', %s, '%')
						GROUP BY id
						LIMIT 100;
						",
						$result['account_id'],
						$result['username']
					), ARRAY_A)

$wpdb->get_results("
		SELECT option_name
        FROM $wpdb->options
        WHERE `option_name` LIKE ('%\_transient\_sbi\_%')
        AND `option_name` NOT LIKE ('%\_transient\_sbi\_header%');", ARRAY_A)

$wpdb->get_results(
			"SELECT * FROM $table_name as p
			INNER JOIN $feeds_posts_table_name AS f ON p.id = f.id
			WHERE p.json_data LIKE '%{%'
			ORDER BY p.time_stamp DESC
			LIMIT 50;",
			ARRAY_A
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
			"SELECT p.id, p.media_id, p.mime_type FROM $table_name as p
					INNER JOIN $feeds_posts_table_name AS f ON p.id = f.id
					WHERE f.hashtag = '';",
			ARRAY_A
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT * FROM $feed_locator_table_name
					WHERE shortcode_atts = %s
					AND html_location IN ( '$location_string' )
					$group_by LIMIT %d OFFSET %d;",
					$args['shortcode_atts'],
					SBI_Db::RESULTS_PER_PAGE,
					$offset
				),
				ARRAY_A
			)

$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT * FROM $feed_locator_table_name
					WHERE feed_id = %s
					AND html_location IN ( '$location_string' )
					$group_by LIMIT %d OFFSET %d;",
					$args['feed_id'],
					SBI_Db::RESULTS_PER_PAGE,
					$offset
				),
				ARRAY_A
			)

$wpdb->get_results(
			"SELECT * FROM $feed_locator_table_name
			WHERE feed_id NOT LIKE '*%'
            AND html_location IN ( '$location_string' )
            $group_by LIMIT $limit OFFSET $offset;",
			ARRAY_A
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_entries
					FROM $feed_locator_table_name
					WHERE shortcode_atts = %s",
					$args['shortcode_atts']
				),
				ARRAY_A
			)

$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_entries
					FROM $feed_locator_table_name
					WHERE feed_id = %s",
					$args['feed_id']
				),
				ARRAY_A
			)

$wpdb->get_results(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT id FROM $feed_locator_table_name
				WHERE html_location = 'unknown'
				AND last_update < %s AND feed_id = %s AND post_id = %d
				LIMIT 1;",
				$one_day_ago,
				$feed_id,
				$post_id
			),
			ARRAY_A
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
			"SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_entries
            FROM $feed_locator_table_name
            WHERE html_location = 'content'",
			ARRAY_A
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
			"SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_entries
            FROM $feed_locator_table_name
            WHERE html_location != 'content'
            AND html_location != 'unknown'
            GROUP BY feed_id",
			ARRAY_A
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
				"SELECT * FROM $feed_locator_table_name
				WHERE html_location IN ('$in')
				$group_by ORDER BY last_update ASC",
				ARRAY_A
			)

			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT * FROM $feed_locator_table_name
				WHERE post_id = %d

				$this->feed_details['feed_id']
			),
			ARRAY_A
		)

			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_entries
				FROM $feed_locator_table_name
				WHERE last_update > %s;",
				$two_minutes_ago
			),
			ARRAY_A
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
					"SELECT p.media_id, p.instagram_id, p.aspect_ratio, p.sizes, p.mime_type
					FROM $posts_table_name AS p
					INNER JOIN $feeds_posts_table_name AS f ON p.id = f.id
					WHERE p.instagram_id IN($id_string)
					AND p.images_done = 1",
					ARRAY_A
				)

$wpdb->get_results(
					$wpdb->prepare(
						"SELECT p.media_id, p.instagram_id, p.aspect_ratio, p.sizes, p.mime_type
						FROM $posts_table_name AS p
						INNER JOIN $feeds_posts_table_name AS f ON p.id = f.id
						WHERE f.feed_id = %s
						AND p.images_done = 1
						ORDER BY p.time_stamp
						DESC LIMIT %d, %d",
						$feed_id,
						$offset,
						(int)$num
					),
					ARRAY_A
				)
$wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare("SELECT id, media_id, top_time_stamp, images_done FROM $table_name WHERE instagram_id = %s LIMIT 1", $instagram_post_id), ARRAY_A)

$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT media_id, aspect_ratio FROM $posts_table_name
					WHERE instagram_id = %s
					LIMIT 1",
					$this->instagram_post_id
				),
				ARRAY_A
			)
$wpdb->get_col($wpdb->prepare("SELECT feed_id FROM $table_name WHERE feed_id = %s AND instagram_id = %s", $feed_id, $this->instagram_post_id))
$wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare("SELECT feed_id FROM $table_name WHERE instagram_id = %s AND feed_id = %s LIMIT 1", $this->instagram_post_id, $feed_id), ARRAY_A)

$wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare("SELECT hashtag FROM $table_name WHERE instagram_id = %s AND hashtag = %s LIMIT 1", $this->instagram_post_id, strtolower(str_replace('#', '', $this->instagram_api_data['term']))), ARRAY_A)
$wpdb->get_results("SELECT id, media_id, mime_type FROM $table_name ORDER BY last_requested ASC LIMIT $max", ARRAY_A)

					)

				WHERE account_type IN ('personal', 'basic')

				AND last_updated < %s
				ORDER BY expires ASC
				LIMIT 5;",
				gmdate('Y-m-d H:i:s', time() + SBI_REFRESH_THRESHOLD_OFFSET),
				gmdate('Y-m-d H:i:s', time() - SBI_MINIMUM_INTERVAL)
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT * FROM $sources_table_name WHERE account_type IN (%s, %s) AND connect_type = %s",
				'basic',
				'personal',
				'personal'

					WHERE feed_id = %s",
					$args['feed_id']
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT id FROM $feed_locator_table_name
				WHERE html_location = 'unknown'
				AND last_update < %s AND feed_id = %s AND post_id = %d
				LIMIT 1;",
				$one_day_ago,
				$feed_id,
				$post_id
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_entries
				FROM $feed_locator_table_name
				WHERE last_update > %s;",
				$two_minutes_ago
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"UPDATE $feed_locator_table_name
				SET last_update = %s, html_location = %s
				WHERE id = %d;",
				date('Y-m-d H:i:s'),
				$location,
				$id
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
						"SELECT p.media_id, p.instagram_id, p.aspect_ratio, p.sizes, p.mime_type
						FROM $posts_table_name AS p
						INNER JOIN $feeds_posts_table_name AS f ON p.id = f.id
						WHERE f.feed_id = %s
						AND p.images_done = 1
						ORDER BY p.time_stamp
						DESC LIMIT %d, %d",
						$feed_id,
						$offset,
						(int)$num
					)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"UPDATE $table_name
			SET last_requested = %s
			WHERE instagram_id IN ({$id_string});",
			date('Y-m-d H:i:s')
		)
$wpdb->prepare("SELECT id, media_id, top_time_stamp, images_done FROM $table_name WHERE instagram_id = %s LIMIT 1", $instagram_post_id)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT media_id, aspect_ratio FROM $posts_table_name
					WHERE instagram_id = %s
					LIMIT 1",
					$this->instagram_post_id
				)
$wpdb->prepare("SELECT feed_id FROM $table_name WHERE feed_id = %s AND instagram_id = %s", $feed_id, $this->instagram_post_id)
$wpdb->prepare("SELECT feed_id FROM $table_name WHERE instagram_id = %s AND feed_id = %s LIMIT 1", $this->instagram_post_id, $feed_id)
$wpdb->prepare("SELECT hashtag FROM $table_name WHERE instagram_id = %s AND hashtag = %s LIMIT 1", $this->instagram_post_id, strtolower(str_replace('#', '', $this->instagram_api_data['term'])))
